title: Transaction Involvement
description: The involved parties in transaction are actually the involved parties that are involved in the process of delivering the service that is requested for (via an instruction) as to fulfil an arranged service within an agreement.

TransactionInvolvementType.description:
Originator / Payer / Customer: The person or entity that initiates the transaction and provides the funds or instruction.
Beneficiary / Payee / Recipient: The person or entity that receives the funds or value from the transaction.
Originator's Bank (Debiting Bank): The bank that holds the originator's account and processes the outgoing transaction.
Beneficiary's Bank (Receiving Bank): The bank that receives the transaction and credits the beneficiary's account.
Intermediary Bank (if applicable): A bank that facilitates the transfer when the originator's bank and beneficiary's bank do not have a direct relationship.
Regulatory Authority: Government or official bodies that oversee banking transactions to ensure legal, regulatory, and financial compliance.
